prompt: Use the reference gradient map to guide the inpainting process, restoring the missing areas of the source image while following the detected boundaries.
prompt_refined: Edit Image 1 by inpainting the masked regions on the man's face, specifically restoring the eyes, nose, and lower face/mouth area. Use Image 2 (the gradient map) as a reference to guide this restoration, ensuring the newly generated facial features accurately follow the detected edges and contours to produce a photorealistic outcome.
